title: Chat Diagnostics debug files in ~README.md/ -- remove AI session leftovers
description: ~README.md/ contains: '## Chat Customization Diagnostics.md', '## Chat Customization Diagnostics2.md', '## Chat Customization Diagnostics3.md' (in PowerShellGUI root). These are AI-session debug notes, not workspace documentation. They violate SS-002 (files outside recognized folders) / T3 classification. Delete all three after confirming no other file references them. Also check for '# Phase 3 Debug Logging & Error Handling.prompt.md' which may also be an AI session artifact.
notes: These files have unusual names starting with ## or # which also suggests they are AI ephemera, not canonical docs.
